meaning: n.从事分类的人,把东西分类拣选的人
examples: A card stacker in card sorter.
Someone put me into a mail sorter.
Is it the coin sorter at your bank?
Dr Gruber expects to have a commercial sperm-sorter ready next year, and Arryx has already signed a deal to deploy it with a British dairy.
Most interesting, I learned that many science fiction readers are Rationals in the Keirsey Temperament Sorter, which tells me that geekdom is as innate as left-handedness.
